query:
ALTER TABLE assessor_evaluations 
ADD COLUMN estimated_repair_cost INT,
ADD COLUMN labor_cost INT,
ADD COLUMN parts_cost INT,
ADD COLUMN estimated_duration INT,
ADD COLUMN damage_assessment TEXT,
ADD COLUMN recommendations TEXT,
ADD COLUMN fraud_risk_level ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high');

ALTER TABLE assessor_evaluations 
MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'submitted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
